61-66. MARS IN SATURNS HOUSE AND ASPECTED BY OTHERS. Should Mars be in
Capricorn, or Aquarius and be aspected by the Sun, the subject will have very dark body, be
courageous, will have many wives, sons and abundant wealth and be very sharp.
Should Mars be in Capricorn, or Aquarius and be aspected by the Moon, one will be fickle
minded, be not well disposed towards his mother, be fond of beautification, be charitable, be
not firm in friendship and be rich.
Should Mars be in Capricorn, or Aquarius and be aspected by Mercury, the subject will walk very
slowly, be not rich, will not have any profession, be not strong, be not outspoken and be not
virtuous.
Should Mars be in Capricorn, or Aquarius and be aspected by Jupiter, the native will be very
beautiful, will possess kingly qualities, will fulfil his undertakings, be long-lived and be
endowed with relatives.
